title: Tom Mitchell
text: Home * People * Tom Mitchell Tom Mitchell at WEF 2017 [1] [2] Tom M. Mitchell , an American computer scientist and AI researcher with focus on machine learning . He is Edward Fredkin University Professor and chair of the Machine Learning Department at Carnegie Mellon University [3] , leading the development of the Never-Ending Language Learning (NELLL) system.
